questions.question: Which of the following routing protocols operates as an Exterior Gateway Protocol (EGP) to handle internet traffic?

answers: The destination path used for traffic traveling outside the local network subnet boundary
The backup DNS server utilized when primary queries fail
The local database server recording updates
The physical hardware switch port connected to the line

questions.question: How does Asymmetric Encryption handle session key setup operations?
answers: It uses a public key to encrypt data and a matching separate private key to decrypt it
It restricts traffic lanes to specific local MAC configurations
It hashes password strings using random salt variables
It relies on a single shared symmetric key rotated periodically

Cryptographic block rotations to shield payload fields
Horizontal expansion of port bounds when traffic spikes occur

The connection is instantly terminated due to an unrecoverable error mismatch condition
